# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: auth-service
    host: auth-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /api
    routes:
      - name: auth-route
        paths:
          - /auth
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

  - name: user-service
    host: user-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /api
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

  - name: order-service
    host: order-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /api
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

  - name: inventory-service
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /api
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        paths:
          - /inventory
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

upstreams:
  - name: auth-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: auth-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: auth-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: user-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: user-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: user-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: order-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: order-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: order-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:

        weight: 100
